title: Microbuilder
description: Decorative datapack for building with tiny blocks
body:
Are regular Minecraft blocks too big for you? Have you always wished for more options to decorate your world? Then **Microbuilder** is the datapack for you! With this pack, you can build moderately small to tiny scenes in the word.


## How to use
You can place and break micro blocks in **Micro Building Mode**, which you can toggle using `/trigger microbuilder`. In Micro Building Mode, you can simply **right click to place** and **left click to break** micro blocks. You can also use a **Glass Bottle** on the micro scene to pick it up and move it around.

If 4 micro blocks per block space is too big, or too small for your liking, you can change the building scale using `/trigger microbuilder.scale set [​value]`. The default scale is 4 micro blocks per block, but you can change it to anywhere from 2 to 16.


## Supported blocks
Microbuilder currently supports *641* Minecraft blocks! You can build with all full blocks, pillars, slabs, stairs, fences, walls, pressure plates, buttons, and much more. Fences and similar blocks will connect to each other, and most blocks behave generally as you would expect them to. Some blocks that are not yet implemented include doors, trapdoors, and fence gates.
